text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The first of the Classic Triple Crown races, the
Satsuki Sho, is finally here, and the air at the
Nakayama Racecourse is electric.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
...Anyway, that's basically how I think things will
go. I mean, what else could happen, really?

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, I dunno. Eishin Flash has really polished up
her game lately...

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
But you've got her down in a really low
placement. She's got a strong following, so what
gives?

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
I get where you're coming from. She seems pretty
strong, she's making a name for herself... but
c'mon!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: This is the Classic Triple Crown!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: So this is the Classic Triple Crown... This is the Satsuki Sho... The crowd is deafening.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Even the air itself feels different from the
previous races I've run. The pressure coming from
the other racers is incredible...
choice_data_list: But the track is still the same.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Precisely. I know the Nakayama Racecourse well
thanks to my participation in the Keisei Hai.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
This is the race where only the fastest shall
prevail... I have already determined the optimal
time to unleash my top speed.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
All that's left is to execute my strategy as usual. I
shall see you in thirty minutes.
